zh.lifeSummary: 當Elder John Strong於1605年6月10日出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特哈德時，他的父親John Strong21歲，母親Mrs. John Strong19歲。他於1630年12月2日與Margerie Deane在英國薩默塞特哈德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1647年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州溫莎女爵且於1659年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾薩普頓。他在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓被列為1st ruling elder of the church in northampton。他去世於1699年4月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓享年93歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓布里奇 史崔特 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elder John Strong于1605年6月10日出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特哈德时，他的父亲John Strong21岁，母亲Mrs. John Strong19岁。他于1630年12月2日与Margerie Deane在英国薩默塞特哈德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1647年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州溫莎女爵且于1659年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾薩普頓。他在美国马萨诸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓被列为1st ruling elder of the church in northampton。他去世于1699年4月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓享年93岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓布里奇 史崔特 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Strong
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English strong(e), strang(e) ‘strong, powerful’ (Old English strang).
Americanized form (translation into English) of Jewish   Stark  .

variants.name: Strang
meanings: German: topographic name from Middle High German stranc ‘strip of land’, or a habitational name from any of the places so called.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): metonymic occupational name for a rope maker, from Middle High German stranc, German Strang ‘cord, rope’.

variants.name: Trehan
meanings: Indian: Sikh name, from a name of a sub-caste of Khatris.

Channel Islands (Jersey): occupational name, a variant of French Trahand, from a derivative of French traire ‘to draw or stretch’, for a silk worker whose job was to draw out the thread from cocoons. In Britain it has sometimes been ‘translated’ into English as Strong .

variants.name: Trahan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Monique, Pierre, Leonce, Lucien, Alcide, Cecile, Emile, Adrien, Camille.

French: variant of Trahant or Trahand (and, in North America, an altered form of the former), a metonymic occupational name for a silkworker who drew out the thread from the cocoons, from a derivative of the verb traire ‘to draw or stretch’. Compare Strong .

History: The LA branches of the Trahan family trace their descent from Guillaume Trahan, from Montreuil-Bellay in Maine-et-Loire, who arrived in Acadia in the 17th century; he married Madeleine Brun in Port-Royal in Acadia (now Annapolis Royal in NS, Canada), c. 1666. At the time of the expulsion of the Acadians (1755–64), his numerous descendants were deported and finally settled principally in the Attakapas country of LA.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.description: Oldest grave seen in the memorial list

Bridge Street Cemetery is located at 156 Bridge Street (Route 9) in Northampton next Lampron Park and the Bridge Street Elementary School.  Established in 1661, it is the oldest cemetery in Northampton.  The City of Northampton oversees the cemetery.

en.lifeSummary: When Elder John Strong was born on 10 June 1605, in Chard, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Strong, was 21 and his mother, Mrs. John Strong, was 19. He married Margerie Deane on 2 December 1630, in Chard, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He lived in Windsor, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America in 1647 and Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1659. His occupation is listed as 1st ruling elder of the church in northampton in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, United States. He died on 14 April 1699, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 93, and was buried in Bridge Street Cemetery, Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, United States.

ko.lifeSummary: Elder John Strong(이)가 1605년 6월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 처드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Strong(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. John Strong(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1630년 12월 2일 영국 서머세트 처드에서 Margerie Deane(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1647년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드소르에서, 1659년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르섬프턴에서 살았다. 그의 직업은 미국 매사추세츠 주 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 1st ruling elder of the church in northampton이었다. 그는 1699년 4월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 93세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 함프실르 노르섬프턴 브리지 스트릿 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elder John Strong nasceu em 10 de junho de 1605, em Chard, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Strong, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. John Strong, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Margerie Deane em 2 de dezembro de 1630, em Chard, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele viveu em Windsor, Conecticute, British Colonial America em 1647 e em Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1659. Sua profissão aparece como 1st ruling elder of the church in northampton em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Ele faleceu em 14 de abril de 1699, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 93 anos, e foi sepultado em Bridge Street Cemetery, Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elder John Strong родился 10 июня 1605 г. в местности чард, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Strong было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. John Strong, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Margerie Deane 2 декабря 1630 г. в местности чард, сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности виндзор, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1647 году и в местности нортамптон, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1659 году.  Он работал по профессии 1st ruling elder of the church in northampton в местности нортамптон, хампшир, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. Он умер 14 апреля 1699 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 93 лет и был похоронен в местности бридж стрит кеметири, нортамптон, хампшир, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elder John Strong nació el 10 de junio de 1605, en Chard, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Strong, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Mrs. John Strong, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Margerie Deane el 2 de diciembre de 1630, en Chard, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Vivió en Windsor, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America en 1647 y en Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1659. Su ocupación registrada era 1st ruling elder of the church in northampton en Northampton, Hampshire, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Murió el 14 de abril de 1699, en Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 93 años, y fue sepultado en Bridge Street Cemetery, Northampton, Hampshire, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
